title: rubus multifidus
intro: Rubus multifidus, also known as the multifid thimbleberry or multifid bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus multifidus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Rubus multifidus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
